children.text: Issues with delivering to the customer
Notice of Rights for NYC Delivery Workers
Delays at the store When experiencing a long wait at the store, customer ratings below 5 stars will not impact your ratings.
When to Dash There are more delivery opportunities during lunch and dinner times.
Issues at the store If the store is unaware of the order, please contact support to either get the order fulfilled or cancelled.
Disappearing orders If an order disappears from your app mid-dash, it was likely cancelled by the customer or the store.
Unassigning order If you are unable to complete an order, you can unassign yourself in-app. This will affect your ratings.
Chat with support Need more help? Chat with us.
Call support Prefer to talk? Call us.
Help center Explore all of our resources
Feeling unsafe? Get help here. Close Tooltip
